examples: The Uzbeks consider the mausoleum a holy place and pray here before heading off on Hadj.
El Hadj Omar Bongo, the president of oil-rich Gabon exposed in 1997 during France's notorious Elf Aquitaine bribery scandal, was a private banking client dating back to 1970.
Ms. AISHA CONTEH (Daughter of Dr. Hadj Conteh): Thank you.
